ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the test case */,
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the browser used for the test */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test case */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag associated with the test case */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the test execution */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the test execution */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the test execution */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status of the test execution */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project this test case belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test case */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the test case */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Last modified time of the test case */,
  "ci_cd_pipeline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CI/CD pipeline associated with the test case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_ci_cd_pipeline_id FOREIGN KEY ("ci_cd_pipeline_id") REFERENCES ci_cd_pipelines ("pipeline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_browser_id FOREIGN KEY ("browser_id") REFERENCES browsers ("browser_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "browsers" (
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each browser */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the browser */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the browser */,
  "os" TEXT /* Operating system on which the browser runs */,
  "is_headless" INTEGER /* Indicates if the browser runs in headless mode */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the browser is the default choice for tests */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("browser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the tag */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Last modified time of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the status */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the status */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Last modified time of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each step */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case this step belongs to */,
  "step_name" TEXT /* Name of the step */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the step */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status of the step execution */,
  "step_number" INTEGER /* Step number within the test case */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the step */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the step */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Last modified time of the step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_steps_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_steps_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_steps_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_steps_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the project */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Last modified time of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user account */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the user account */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Last modified time of the user account */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case where the issue was found */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the issue */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status of the issue */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the issue is assigned */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the issue */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the issue */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Last modified time of the issue */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time when the issue was resolved */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of how the issue was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ci_cd_pipelines" (
  "pipeline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CI/CD pipeline */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project this pipeline belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the pipeline */,
  "trigger" TEXT /* Trigger condition for the pipeline */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status of the pipeline */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the pipeline */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the pipeline */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Last modified time of the pipeline */,
  "last_run_time" TEXT /* Last time the pipeline was run */,
  "next_run_time" TEXT /* Next scheduled run time of the pipeline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pipeline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ci_cd_pipelines_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ci_cd_pipelines_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ci_cd_pipelines_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ci_cd_pipelines_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pipeline_steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each step */,
  "pipeline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pipeline this step belongs to */,
  "step_name" TEXT /* Name of the step */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the step */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status of the step execution */,
  "step_number" INTEGER /* Step number within the pipeline */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the step */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the step */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Last modified time of the step */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the step execution */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the step execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pipeline_steps_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pipeline_steps_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pipeline_steps_pipeline_id FOREIGN KEY ("pipeline_id") REFERENCES ci_cd_pipelines ("pipeline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pipeline_steps_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case this result belongs to */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Time of the test execution */,
  "log_output" TEXT /* Log output from the test execution */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status of the test execution */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the test was executed */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test result */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the test result */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Last modified time of the test result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the role */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Last modified time of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the permission */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the permission */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Last modified time of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role-permission relationship */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the role-permission relationship */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Last modified time of the role-permission relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
